docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF VALERIO, JULIET ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, (W/AUTHORIZATION LETTER FROM JULIET VALERIO)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VALERIO, JULIET AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSEN, DELAUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-29-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSEN, DELAUN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALERIO, JULIET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERSEN, DELAUN $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75.00, ALTHOUGH THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY FAILED TO FULLY COMPLY WITH THE APPLICABLE CC& R'S FOR THE CONDOMINIUM, THE COURT DOES NOT FIND A BASIS AWARDING OF MONEY DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
